name: Apple Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add cold milk, stirring to form a smooth dough.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and divide into 6 equal portions.
5. Roll each portion large enough to cover one apple.
6. Place an apple at the center of each piece of pastry.
7. Mix sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
8. Spoon some of this mixture into each core cavity of the apples.
9. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water or beaten egg, then fold over the apples, sealing the edges.
10. Place on a greased baking sheet or shallow pan.
11. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the apples are tender and the pastry is lightly browned.
12. Remove from the oven and serve warm with milk or cream.
